title: Multipet Swingin 19-Inch Large Plush Dog Toy with Extra Long Arms and Legs with Squeakers
features: Interactive Playtime: Designed with extra-long arms and legs, this plush dog toy is perfect for shaking, tossing and tugging, encouraging active play and bonding time with your pet.
Engaging Squeakers: Features multiple built-in squeakers that create an irresistible sound, stimulating your dog’s natural instincts and keeping them entertained for hours.
Soft & Cuddly: Made from plush, pet-safe materials, this toy provides comfort and companionship, making it ideal for both play and snuggle time.
Durable & Washable: Crafted for long-lasting fun, this stuffed animal toy is easy to clean, ensuring a hygienic play experience for dogs of all breeds.
Generous Size: Measuring 48 cm, this large plush toy is suitable for dogs of all sizes, offering a fun and engaging experience for puppies and adult dogs alike.
description: From the manufacturer Multipet Swingin Large Plush Dog Toy with Extra Long Arms and Legs Bring endless fun to your dog’s playtime with the Multipet Swingin Plush Dog Toy! Designed especially for large breeds, this oversized toy features extra-long floppy arms and legs that are perfect for shaking, tossing, and interactive play. The built-in squeaker adds an extra layer of excitement, keeping your dog entertained for hours. Made from soft yet durable plush fabric, it’s built to handle playful chewing and tugging. Whether indoors or outdoors, this toy is a great way to keep your pup active and happy.
